displayName: MAR Ceramic (Medium Archival Reference — ARL standard)
notes: MAR (Medium Archival Reference) ceramic — ARL standard reference material for ballistic testing. A 96% Al2O3 body with controlled grain size. RHAe ~2.6-3.0 per mm vs 7.62 AP. Used as cross-laboratory reference for ceramic armor validation. Flexural strength ~300 MPa, K1c ~4.0 MPa·m^½.
